example: The doctor will give you a checkup to make sure you are healthy.
The doctor uses a stethoscope to listen to your heart and lungs.
The doctor may give you medicine to help you feel better.
If you are hurt, the doctor might put a bandage on your wound.
A nurse helps the doctor and takes care of patients.
An optometrist is an eye doctor who checks your vision.
The eye doctor told Billy he needs glasses to see better.
A veterinarian is a doctor who helps sick animals.
If your pet is sick, you can take it to the vet.
